name: lockdin
description: Chrome extension that hides LinkedIn's main feed, news rail, and notifications entry.

scripts.package: npm run sync-photos && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/lockdin-*.zip && zip -r "dist/lockdin-$(node -p "require('./package.json').version").zip" manifest.json background.js content.js feed-block.css assets -x "*/.*" "*/__MACOSX/*"
